member.name: T:Domain.Composite.Acceso
member.summary: Abstract base component of the Composite design pattern used to model the permission tree.
member.remarks: A permission tree is composed of interior nodes and leaf nodes. All tree traversal and permission checks operate against the abstraction, allowing uniform treatment of individual permissions and permission groups.

member.name: P:Domain.Composite.Acceso.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier of this access component.

member.name: P:Domain.Composite.Acceso.Nombre
member.summary: Human-readable display name.

member.name: P:Domain.Composite.Acceso.Accesos
member.summary: Returns the direct children of this node. Leaf nodes () always return an empty list.

member.name: M:Domain.Composite.Acceso.Agregar(Domain.Composite.Acceso)
member.summary: Adds as a direct child of this node.
member.exception: Thrown by leaf nodes () that do not support children.

member.name: M:Domain.Composite.Acceso.Eliminar(Domain.Composite.Acceso)
member.summary: Removes from the direct children of this node.
member.param: The component to remove, matched by .
member.exception: Thrown by leaf nodes () that do not support children.

member.name: T:Domain.Composite.Familia
member.summary: Composite (interior) node in the permission tree that groups zero or more children, which may themselves be instances or leaves.
member.remarks: Duplicate children (same ) are silently ignored on .

member.name: P:Domain.Composite.Familia.Accesos
member.summary: The direct children of this family node.

member.name: M:Domain.Composite.Familia.Agregar(Domain.Composite.Acceso)
member.summary: Adds to this family's child list. If a child with the same already exists, the call is a no-op.

member.name: M:Domain.Composite.Familia.Eliminar(Domain.Composite.Acceso)
member.summary: Removes the child whose matches . If no such child exists the call is a no-op.

member.name: M:Domain.Composite.Familia.ClearAccesos
member.summary: Removes all children from this family.

member.name: T:Domain.Composite.Patente
member.summary: Leaf node in the permission tree representing a single, atomic permission.
member.remarks: instances cannot have children; calling or throws . Permission checks compare against constants via .

member.name: P:Domain.Composite.Patente.TipoAcceso
member.summary: Permission key matched against constants during authorization checks.

member.name: P:Domain.Composite.Patente.DataKey
member.summary: Auxiliary data key used for UI display or additional filtering. Typically equals .

member.name: P:Domain.Composite.Patente.Accesos
member.summary: Always returns an empty list; leaf nodes have no children.

member.name: M:Domain.Composite.Patente.Agregar(Domain.Composite.Acceso)
member.exception: Always thrown — leaf nodes do not support children.

member.name: M:Domain.Composite.Patente.Eliminar(Domain.Composite.Acceso)
member.exception: Always thrown — leaf nodes do not support children.

member.name: T:Domain.Composite.PermisoKeys
member.summary: Defines the canonical string keys for every permission in the system.
member.remarks: Each constant maps to the value stored in the database and is the single source of truth for authorization checks performed by . uses reflection over this class to auto-provision any missing records on startup.

member.name: T:Domain.Usuario
member.summary: Domain entity representing an application user.
member.remarks: is stored as a SHA-256 hex digest (see ). is a SHA-256 integrity verifier computed over Id + NombreUsuario + Password + Estado to detect out-of-band record tampering.

member.name: P:Domain.Usuario.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier, auto-generated on construction.

member.name: P:Domain.Usuario.NombreUsuario
member.summary: Unique login name.

member.name: P:Domain.Usuario.Password
member.summary: SHA-256 hex digest of the user's password.

member.name: P:Domain.Usuario.Estado
member.summary: true if the account is active; false if disabled.

member.name: P:Domain.Usuario.DigitoVerificador
member.summary: Integrity verifier computed over core user fields. Recalculated on every update via UsuarioService.UpdateDV().

member.name: P:Domain.Usuario.Permisos
member.summary: Permission tree roots assigned to this user (mix of and nodes).

member.name: M:Domain.Usuario.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with a freshly generated .
